items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tensions Rise in Strait of Hormuz Over Ship Attacks and Iranian Threats
items.summary: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they were closing the strait until the U.S. blockade is lifted. Two ships reported being hit as they tried to pass through the strait.
